task: #src/agent.rs run_tui currently calculates input and output tokens and shows it to the user, can we configure this to work with actual cost also? So essentially we need to know which how much the users configured model costs in #src/config.rs #src/tui/config_view.rs

steps.instruction:
In src/config.rs:24-61 (Profile struct), add after line 44 (after cost_per_mtok_input): `/// Optional: cost per 1M output tokens in USD. pub cost_per_mtok_output: Option<f64>,`

steps.description: Calculate and send cost in run_tui AgentDone event
steps.instruction:
In src/agent.rs:441-448 (UiEvent::AgentDone emission), calculate cost: let cost = config.cost_per_mtok_input.map(|r| (total_input_tokens as f64 / 1_000_000.0) * r).unwrap_or(0.0) + config.cost_per_mtok_output.map(|r| (total_output_tokens as f64 / 1_000_000.0) * r).unwrap_or(0.0); and add cost_usd field to UiEvent::AgentDone
[index: `UiEvent` at line 535 in src/callgraph.rs]
[index: `UiEvent` at line 56 in src/tui/mod.rs]
